concept_kinds.label: Ability
concept_kinds.description: An owned innate, trained, or granted capability.

concept_kinds.label: Ability Mechanic
concept_kinds.description: A bounded modifier to eligibility, checks, costs, or outcomes.

concept_kinds.label: Basis
concept_kinds.description: Grounding that makes a capability coherent in its world.

concept_kinds.label: Condition
concept_kinds.description: A recognized persistent state outside the registry preset set.

concept_kinds.label: Functional Family
concept_kinds.description: A cross-genre family of intended function and delivery behavior.

concept_kinds.label: Identity
concept_kinds.description: A distinct kind of actor, entity, or organized subject.

concept_kinds.label: Relationship State
concept_kinds.description: A durable social bond, obligation, or relation between exact subjects.

concept_kinds.label: Resource
concept_kinds.description: A measurable capacity, reserve, debt, charge, or cost.

concept_kinds.label: Semantic Primitive
concept_kinds.description: A small reusable meaning operation used to describe a capability.

concept_kinds.label: Skill
concept_kinds.description: A learned proficiency or check domain.

concept_kinds.label: World State
concept_kinds.description: A durable fact whose subject or effect is wider than one transient action.

scale_axes.label: Power
scale_axes.description: The owned capability ceiling or potency before one result is settled.

scale_axes.label: Severity
scale_axes.description: The consequence multiplier or band applied by an admitted mechanic.

scale_axes.label: Target Count
scale_axes.description: The number and identity shape of intended subjects.

scale_axes.label: Area
scale_axes.description: The spatial shape or zone affected by one use.

scale_axes.label: Range
scale_axes.description: The allowed distance or reach between source and subject.

scale_axes.label: Duration
scale_axes.description: How long a settled state or effect remains active.

scale_axes.label: World Scope
scale_axes.description: The highest actor, institution, territory, or world scale reached.

scale_axes.label: Propagation
scale_axes.description: How an effect spreads after its admitted cause.

scale_axes.label: Reversibility
scale_axes.description: Whether and how committed consequences can end or be undone.

authority_stages.label: Recognized
authority_stages.description: Language or authoring input maps to candidate canonical meaning.

authority_stages.label: Defined
authority_stages.description: One immutable world-specific definition revision exists.

authority_stages.label: Assigned
authority_stages.description: One exact subject acquired that exact definition revision.

authority_stages.label: Eligible
authority_stages.description: Current trusted context permits evaluation by a compatible adapter.

authority_stages.label: Admitted
authority_stages.description: A versioned adapter and distinct receipt are accepted for this use.

authority_stages.label: Settled
authority_stages.description: The owning reducer committed one complete result atomically.

authority_stages.label: Replayed
authority_stages.description: The exact baked result reconstructs without consulting mutable latest data.

cube_faces.label: Recognition
cube_faces.description: Canonical candidates and source spans preserve the intended surface.

cube_faces.label: Binding
cube_faces.description: One current event connects actor, action, subjects, scope, and occurrence.

cube_faces.label: World Alignment
cube_faces.description: Exact ledger-backed identities and relations ground the event.

cube_faces.label: Admission
cube_faces.description: Ownership, eligibility, adapter, cost, and receipt authority permit execution.

cube_faces.label: Complete Settlement
cube_faces.description: One atomic replay-stable receipt owns the whole result.

cube_faces.label: Narrator Transfer
cube_faces.description: The final source-free packet preserves settled and unresolved truth.

cube_faces.label: HUD Visibility
cube_faces.description: The Witness Layer shows the relevant result without changing it.
